# Weblyfe.ai - AI Automation Agency

> We build AI systems that run your business 24/7. Custom chatbots, workflow automation, and digital employees.

## About

Weblyfe.ai is an AI automation agency based in the Netherlands. We specialize in building autonomous AI systems for creators, agencies, and service businesses.

Founded by Seyed Hosseini, we have deployed AI assistants that handle lead qualification, customer support, operations management, and administrative tasks for multiple companies.

## Services

### OpenClaw Setup (2500-10000 EUR)
Deploy your own AI operations platform. Includes custom AI agents, tool integrations (Slack, Telegram, WhatsApp, Calendar, CRM), Mission Control dashboard, and training.

### Super Assistant Employee (1500 EUR/month)
AI assistant that replaces full-time hires. Works 24/7 across WhatsApp, Telegram, and Email. Handles lead qualification, customer support, scheduling, and admin tasks.

### Business Foundation Fix (3000-15000 EUR)
Connect and optimize your entire tech stack. Includes audit, integration architecture, automation setup (Zapier/Make/n8n), and team training.

### AI-Powered Web Development (2500-25000 EUR)
Websites built by AI, supervised by humans. Design in Figma, development in Next.js or Webflow, SEO optimization, analytics setup.

### AI Marketing Operations (1000 EUR/month)
Automated content, social media, and email marketing. Includes content calendar, automated posting, email sequences, and monthly strategy calls.

## Case Studies

### CZA Ben de Voorman
Dutch construction company. AI WhatsApp lead qualification. Response time: 4 hours to 2 minutes. 40% more leads captured.
URL: https://weblyfe.ai/case-studies/cza-ben-de-voorman

### SAFESITE Security
Security company. Voice to website in 24 hours. Zero meetings, zero revision cycles.
URL: https://weblyfe.ai/case-studies/safesite-security
Live: https://safesite-security.vercel.app

### Eva Dubai Property
Real estate AI operations manager. 80% tasks automated. Replaces 3 FTEs.
URL: https://weblyfe.ai/case-studies/eva-dubai-property
Live: https://dubai-property.nl

### PrivaNotify
AI-powered anonymous messaging SaaS. 100% abuse blocked. First deal 3000 EUR.
URL: https://weblyfe.ai/case-studies/privanotify
Live: https://privanotify.com

### Bot Farm Defense
Automated reputation protection. 9 fake reviews removed in 2 hours.
URL: https://weblyfe.ai/case-studies/bot-farm-defense

### Titan Transfers
Premium limousine booking platform. Bilingual EN/NL, 65% mobile conversions.
URL: https://weblyfe.ai/case-studies/titan-transfers
Live: https://titantransfers.nl

### Boooth.me
Photo booth rental booking system. 40% conversion lift, 90% quote admin saved.
URL: https://weblyfe.ai/case-studies/boooth-booking
Live: https://boooth.me

### Appie System
Multi-agent AI system. 3 specialized agents working 24/7. Zero deadlines missed.
URL: https://weblyfe.ai/case-studies/appie-system

Website: https://weblyfe.ai

Booking: https://weblyfe.ai/#book
Parent Company: https://weblyfe.nl

## Technical

Stack: Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Vercel, Claude AI, OpenClaw
Languages: English, Dutch (Nederlands)

## API

No public API available. For integrations, contact hello@weblyfe.ai.
